rationale: Dim1: Answer key group=control; output misstatement_probability=42, which falls in the 30<p<50 control band → 1 (not low enough for 2, not >=50 for 0). Dim2: null per rubric (control case; mechanism graded only for treatment). Dim3: nulls per rubric (control case). Dim4: Consistency rule satisfied — p=42 with risk_tier 'watch' (40<=p<70 => watch/elevated), so no cap at 1. Evidence quality: citations are specific provided data points with values, dates, and accession numbers (e.g., allowance $1,442,000 at 2012-12-31 → $338,000 at 2013-12-31 vs AR growth $459.1M → $559.8M, both sourced to the FY2013/FY2014 10-Ks; 2010 NI $79,758,000 vs OCF $5,166,000 from the FY2012 10-K comparatives; Q4-2013 NI $67,489,000 vs implied Q4 OI ~$60,275,000 derived from FY2013 OI $116,524,000). The mechanism assertions on this control case are genuinely anchored in the cited data (coverage-ratio arithmetic, quarterly derivation) and combine multiple years (2010-2014) and multiple statement types coherently → 3. Memorization_suspect_condition2: false — the reasoning repeatedly points at concrete provided data content (not bare document lists) and mentions no post-cutoff revelation/enforcement/outcome facts.

_meta.mapping_access_note: scoring/id_mapping_v2.json opened mechanically by grader_runner for answer-key join; neutral IDs only on stdout (label-joining deferred to Phase 6)
